untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing individual stock returns to universe average return and detecting serial anti-correlation of relative returns. The allowed indicators set does not include universe-level aggregates, relative performance metrics, or anti-correlation detection. Specifically missing: (1) universe average return calculation, (2) relative return vs universe metric, (3) serial correlation analysis. These require cross-sectional or multi-asset computations beyond single-stock price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: The signal describes a mean-reversion strategy based on relative underperformance (stock return below universe average) with expectation of reversal. A simplified proxy using negative returns as entry has been drafted, but this fundamentally misses the relative and cross-sectional nature of the strategy. Author-silent parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) further limit accurate translation. A proper implementation would require universe-relative performance data not available in the allowed indicator set.
